task: Write a 1,500-word blog post about 'Why Remote Teams Need Async Communication Tools' targeting engineering managers.
expect: Includes SEO metadata (title tag, meta description, target keyword) and uses H2 subheadings for clear structure
Provides actionable advice with specific tool categories or workflow examples rather than vague generalities
Ends with a clear CTA and maintains a tone appropriate for engineering managers (data-driven, practical)

task: Create a content brief and outline for a pillar page on 'Complete Guide to API Security' that will anchor 8 cluster articles.
expect: Includes a keyword strategy with primary keyword, secondary keywords, and cluster topic mapping
Provides an internal linking plan showing how the pillar connects to each of the 8 cluster articles
Breaks down sections with word count targets per section and specifies total estimated word count

task: Rewrite this AI-generated blog post to remove detectable AI patterns while keeping the core message.
expect: Identifies specific AI tells such as hollow openers ('In today's fast-paced world'), hedge phrases, and vague generalities
Replaces generic statements with specific examples, data points, or first-person experience signals
Adds E-E-A-T signals (expertise markers, cited sources, author perspective) to build credibility
